name_en: [Chipped Version] Model: M46373 This OnTheGo small handbag combines Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, accented with Monogram Giant pattern. Toron handles and jacquard shoulder strap with brand embossing create a visual contrast, while the detachable coin purse is suitable for storing coins or small items. Combining fashion and versatility, it makes a perfect daily companion. 25.0 x 19.0 x 11.5 cm (L x H x W)
